hero.headline: Offline site surveys. On your terms.
hero.subheadline: Sign in once. Capture floorplans, pins, notes, and photos offline. Sync manually to your Google Drive.

before: Lose context when offline; notes split across apps
Paper plans get messy and misplaced
Photos scatter across devices and chats
after: Capture pins, notes, photos online or offline
One-tap manual sync to your Google Drive

items.title: Offline capture
items.summary: Keep working without signal after your first sign‑in.

items.title: Manual sync
items.summary: You choose when to upload and retry—no background sync.

items.title: Your Drive
items.summary: Exports live under /My Drive/FieldPins/ — you keep ownership.

driveProof.folderPathExample:
/My Drive/
└── FieldPins/
    └── Building A__p_12345/
        ├── floorplans/
        ├── pins/
        ├── photos/
        └── project.json
bullets: Photos and assets upload under your account
project.json is written last for consistency

items.title: Photo pipeline
items.benefit: 4 photos per pin, resized to 1080p JPEG

items.title: Field-ready UI
items.benefit: Dark-mode mobile design with 44px tap targets

items.title: Autosave
items.benefit: Edits save on change and on close

items.title: Last-write-wins
items.benefit: Simple, clear conflict handling for MVP

items.title: Portable export
items.benefit: JSON plus assets in your Drive

howItWorks.title: How it works
steps: Sign in with Google and create a project
Drop pins and attach notes/photos — online or offline
Tap Sync to upload to your Google Drive
Share JSON exports and photos straight from Drive

security.title: Security & privacy
security.intro: FieldPin keeps survey data in your control. Offline edits stay on-device until you sync.

items.title: Scopes you approve
items.description: We request only openid, email, profile, and Drive for uploads.

items.title: Device-first storage
items.description: Dexie/IndexedDB stores projects locally until you trigger sync.

items.title: Drive ownership
items.description: Exports write to /My Drive/FieldPins/<ProjectName>__<projectId>/ with project.json last.

items.title: Manual control
items.description: No background sync. You decide when to upload, retry, or relink.

items.q: Do I need a new account?
items.a: Sign in with Google is required. We request basic profile and Drive to create an /FieldPins/ folder in your My Drive for sync.

items.q: Can I start offline before sign-in?
items.a: No. First sign-in requires connectivity. After you sign in once, you can capture online or offline.
On-device while offline (IndexedDB). Sync uploads to /My Drive/FieldPins/<ProjectName>__<projectId>/.
No. Sync is manual in MVP so crews stay in control in the field.
Up to four photos per pin, resized client-side to max 1080p JPEG (~0.75 quality).
A JSON file (project.json) plus floorplan and photo assets in your Drive folders.

finalCta.headline: Ready to capture your next survey?
finalCta.subheadline: Sign in once, then capture online or offline and sync on your terms.
